name: Registry CI Smoke Test
summary: Minimal plugin used to validate registry PR checks and generated indexes.

summaryI18n.zh: 用于验证注册表 PR 校验与索引生成的最小插件。
summaryI18n.en: Minimal plugin used to validate registry PR checks and generated indexes.

author: Locus Test
description: Smoke test plugin for validating the Locus registry source-entry PR workflow, release archive verification, and generated public manifest, shard, entry, and search indexes.

descriptionI18n.zh: 用于验证 Locus 注册表原始条目 PR、release 归档校验，以及 public manifest、shard、entry、search 索引生成的 smoke test 插件。
descriptionI18n.en: Smoke test plugin for validating the Locus registry source-entry PR workflow, release archive verification, and generated public manifest, shard, entry, and search indexes.
